basic_details.job_title: CDM&PHO Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Physician/Consultant Medicine, and MO MBBS Posts
basic_details.post_name: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS
basic_details.short_information: Chief District Medical Office, Balangir (CDM&PHO Balangir) Recruitment 2026: Chief District Medical Office, Balangir is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 3 Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: Minimum Age: 21 years, Maximum Age: 65 years. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: Minimum Age: 21 years, Maximum Age: 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration from Odisha Council of Medical Registration. MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine preferred for Physician/Consultant Medicine. MBBS or equivalent degree for MO MBBS.
qualification.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India. Must have valid registration from the Odisha Council of Medical Registration. Candidates with MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine from any recognized University/Institution will be preferred. MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: MBBS or equivalent degree from Medical College or Medical Institution recognized by Medical Council of India. Must have a valid registration certificate under Odisha Medical Registration rule 1965.

vacancy_details.Post Name: MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 86,116/- pm + Others allowances for Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE; Rs. 57,409/- pm + Others allowances for MO MBBS
salary_details.details: Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE: Rs.86,116/- pm + Others allowances as per PIP MO MBBS at UHWC under PM-ABHIM: Rs.57,409/- pm + Others allowances (PM-ABHIM)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CDM&PHO Balangir Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts is scheduled to be held on 09 June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by CDM&PHO Balangir?
faq.answer: Chief District Medical Office, Balangir has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS. These vacancies are to be filled through a walk-in interview process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for both Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years. No age relaxation details are provided in the extracted data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for MO MBBS post?
faq.answer: For the MO MBBS post, candidates must possess an MBBS or equivalent degree from a Medical College or Medical Institution recognized by the Medical Council of India. A valid registration certificate under Odisha Medical Registration rule 1965 is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE post will receive a salary of Rs. 86,116/- per month, along with other allowances as per the PIP (Programme Implementation Plan).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the CDM&PHO Balangir Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Interested candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date and venue with all required documents and a filled application form if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies. Passport-size photographs may also be required.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Office of CDM&PHO, Balangir. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there is no mention of any application fee for any category of candidates applying for these posts. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications, experience, and performance during the interview.
